The '''Velabri''' were a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] race from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] also known as [[Velabri]]. They were generally known as a warlike race with a strict code of honor, despising crime. The [[Velabri Bloodvow]] was practiced among the Velabri, similar to the [[Life debt/Legends|Life debt]] used by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] and [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]].<ref name="SF" />

They were distinguishable from [[Human/Legends|Humans]] by their pure white [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and spiky silver [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="SF" />
